since_last: 55% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.54%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -2.38% · Gold +0.76% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 55% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.54%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.54%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.24%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.29% at $138.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
